summary: 3 High, 2 Medium issues found. All High resolved. 1 Medium resolved. 1 Low resolved.

findings.title: Stored XSS via WebSocket log broadcast
findings.fix: Escaped d.ts and d.message with .replace(/</g,'<') before innerHTML

findings.title: innerHTML for server-sourced log data
findings.fix: Escaped e.time and e.message in REST log refresh innerHTML

findings.title: Server binds to all interfaces
findings.fix: Changed default host from 0.0.0.0 to 127.0.0.1, overridable via MARKETMIND_HOST env var

findings.title: No input validation on POST /api/info/inject
findings.rationale: info_injector.py already validates internally. Add size limits if needed later.

findings.title: Temp file leak on exception in ael_experiment.py
findings.fix: Wrapped main logic in try/finally with db.close() and os.unlink(tmp_path)

files_cleared: api/websocket.py — Clean JSON broadcast, no injection, proper ping/pong keep-alive
api/data_providers.py — No raw SQL (uses ORM), no path traversal from user input
api/routes.py — All endpoints return JSONResponse, no HTML injection possible
